texto: The greatest peril of life lies in the fact that human food consists entirely of souls. All the creatures that we to kill and eat, all those that we have to strike down and destroy to make clothes for ourselves, have souls, souls that do not perish with the body and which must therefore be pacified lest they revenge themselves on us for taking away their bodies
explicacao: Orientação direta de Knud Rasmussen sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. A afirmação “The greatest peril of life lies in the fact that human food consists entirely of souls. All the c…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, magic, shamanism, útil em momentos de shamanism e witchcraft.
